name: Baked Stained Glass Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 and 1/2 cups Gum drops (in small pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the sugar and margarine until light and fluffy.
2. Blend in the vanilla extract and eggs.
3. Sift flour into another bowl; level off. Stir in flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Gently fold in gum drops.
5. Shape dough into two 1-1/2 inch diameter rolls. Wrap in waxed paper and chill at least 1 hour.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Grease cookie sheets with butter or cooking spray.
8. With a sharp knife, slice dough into 1/4-inch slices.
9. Place the cookies on prepared baking sheets.
10. Bake for 8-11 minutes until lightly golden brown.
11. Remove from oven and let cool completely on wire racks before serving.
Make 5 to 6 dozen cookies.
